General Motors is a multinational corporation headquartered in Detroit, Michigan, known for designing, manufacturing, marketing, and distributing vehicles and vehicle parts worldwide.

Hanukkah is an eight-day Jewish festival, typically in December, celebrating the rededication of the Second Temple in Jerusalem and the miracle of the oil.
Pride parades are LGBTQ+ celebrations held annually in various cities, featuring marches, performances, and community events to promote visibility and equality.
The Winter Olympic Games are a multi-sport event held every four years, featuring winter sports competitions and representing various nations worldwide.
